mapper.sql: organization_id, organization_code, organization_name, organization_name_en, organization_type, status, parent_organization_id, tax_id, phone_number, fax_number, email, address, established_date, description, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM organizations ORDER BY organization_code
SELECT FROM organizations WHERE parent_organization_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY organization_code
SELECT FROM organizations WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY organization_code
mapper.update: UPDATE organizations SET organization_code = #{code}, organization_name = #{name}, organization_type = #{type}, status = #{status}, parent_organization_id = #{parentId}, tax_id = #{taxId}, phone_number = #{phone}, fax_number = #{fax}, email = #{email}, address = #{address}, established_date = #{establishedDate}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE organization_id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE organizations SET status = 'INACTIVE', updated_at = NOW() WHERE organization_id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM organizations WHERE organization_code = #{code})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM organizations WHERE organization_id = #{id})
